description_long: This is a modern, angular fighter jet with a predominantly white fuselage accented by black stripes and insignia on the wings. The cockpit is enclosed with a bright blue canopy, positioned at the front of the aircraft, and appears to be a single-seat configuration. The wings are sharply swept back, with black stripes and a red insignia on the left wing, and the tail section features twin vertical stabilizers with gold-tipped ends. The jet has three prominent engine exhausts at the rear, suggesting a high-performance design. The undercarriage is not visibly extended, indicating retractable landing gear. The overall design is sleek and aerodynamic, suitable for high-speed flight.
description: A sleek, white fighter jet with swept-back wings, blue canopy, and twin gold-tipped vertical stabilizers. Features black stripes, insignia, and three rear engine exhausts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue cockpit canopy, swept-back wings, and nose details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angular fuselage, cockpit placement, and wing insignia.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin vertical stabilizers, three engine exhausts, and tail structure.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cockpit, wing stripes, and gold-tipped stabilizers.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, sharply swept wings with no visible winglets and a slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Triple jet engines integrated at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Twin vertical stabilizers in a conventional tail configuration.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visibly extended).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a blue canopy.
